summary: CVE Management Platform (Phase 1) testing complete. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - 6 tabs verified working (Overview, CVE Database, Services, SBOM, Policies, Audit Trail).

issues: Consider adding pagination controls at bottom for large CVE lists

critical_code_review_comments: CVE Management Service well-structured with proper MongoDB collections separation
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id correctly using {'_id': 0} projection
SBOM generation correctly parses package.json and requirements.txt
Audit trail logs all actions with timestamps and user context
Frontend data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/cve/seed - seeded 4 services, 5 CVEs, 1 SBOM. Additional test CVEs created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CVE Management Platform Phase 1 fully functional. MongoDB collections: cve_entries, cve_services, cve_sbom_records, cve_severity_policies, cve_audit_trail. All APIs return proper JSON without _id. Frontend dark theme with slate-950 background, cyan accents. Tabs use lucide-react icons.

mocked_apis.note: All CVE management APIs are real with MongoDB persistence

backend_tests.GET /api/cve/health: PASS - Returns {status: healthy, service: CVE Management Platform}
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/dashboard: PASS - Returns stats with severity_breakdown, open_cves, fixed_cves, verified_cves, recent_cves, recent_activity
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/seed: PASS - Seeds sample data (4 services, 5 CVEs)
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/entries: PASS - Lists CVEs with pagination (7 total)
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/entries: PASS - Creates new CVE entry with auto-generated id
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/entries/{id}: PASS - Gets CVE by id or cve_id
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/services: PASS - Lists 4 services with open_cves count
backend_tests.DELETE /api/cve/services/{id}: PASS - Deletes service, returns 404 on re-fetch
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/sbom/generate: PASS - Generates SBOM with 293 components (FE: 83, BE: 210)
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/sbom/{id}: PASS - Gets full SBOM with component details
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/policies: PASS - Returns severity policies with SLA hours
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/audit-trail: PASS - Returns audit entries with total count

frontend_tests.Header elements visible: PASS - Title, Seed Data btn, Run Scan btn
frontend_tests.Overview stat cards: PASS - open-cves, overdue, fixed, verified, services, sboms
frontend_tests.CVE Database tab elements: PASS - search, status filter, severity filter, Add CVE btn
frontend_tests.CVE creation modal: PASS - Has cve_id, title, severity, cvss, submit fields
frontend_tests.Services tab: PASS - Shows 4 services with Register Service btn
frontend_tests.SBOM tab: PASS - Shows 2 SBOMs with Generate SBOM btn
frontend_tests.Policies tab: PASS - Shows SLA inputs for all severities with Save btn
